_note: This is the live eval set. The pristine reference copy lives at resources/examples/eval_example.json.

evals.prompt: Find Senior/Staff Data Engineer jobs in Remote-US or NYC posted in the last 14 days. Use the example profile in resources/datasets/profile_example.json.
evals.expected_output: FinalReport with at least 3 ranked matches, each with TechnicalAnalysis, ComplianceAnalysis, and CandidateMatch populated.
expectations: FinalReport.summary.total_jobs >= 3
Every ranked_match has technical, compliance, and match populated
Every CandidateMatch.verdict is one of: apply, tailor_first, skip, research_more
Every Job has a source_url that resolves to a job posting
ranked_matches are sorted by match.priority ascending then fit_score descending
FinalReport.summary.verdicts counts equal the verdicts in ranked_matches
No two jobs share the same (title, company, location) tuple
blockers: Every Job has a source_url that resolves to a job posting
Every CandidateMatch.verdict is one of: apply, tailor_first, skip, research_more

evals.prompt: Same as eval 1, but the search query has zero results (titles=['Quantum Sandwich Architect']).
evals.expected_output: Run halts cleanly with a 'no matches' surface; no downstream agents run.
expectations: FinalReport is not produced
Run log contains a single entry from job_scout with status: ok and 0 jobs
No technical_analyst, compliance_risk, or application_strategist invocations appear in the log
User-facing message is 'no matches found' or equivalent

evals.prompt: Run the JD-Crew on a JD that explicitly mentions 'work with patient records'. Verify Compliance flags HIPAA exposure with a citation.
evals.expected_output: ComplianceAnalysis includes a HIPAA finding with evidence quoting the JD.
expectations: ComplianceAnalysis.findings includes at least one finding with kind: HIPAA_exposure
The HIPAA finding's evidence quotes the literal phrase 'patient records' from the JD
The HIPAA finding has a non-empty citation_url
compliance.regulated_data includes 'PHI'
blockers: The HIPAA finding's evidence quotes the literal phrase 'patient records' from the JD

evals.prompt: Run the Resume Tailor on a JD that requires Snowflake. The candidate's master resume does NOT mention Snowflake.
evals.expected_output: TailoredResume does not invent Snowflake experience.
expectations: TailoredResume.truthfulness_check == 'passed'
TailoredResume.ats_keywords_missing includes 'Snowflake'
No bullet in TailoredResume mentions Snowflake
Every bullet in TailoredResume maps to a bullet in the master resume per edits log
blockers: No bullet in TailoredResume mentions Snowflake

evals.prompt: Run job_scout against the standard Senior Data Engineer search. At least one returned board occasionally serves jobs whose listings have been pulled (404 or 410). Verify the scout drops dead links before downstream agents see them.
evals.expected_output: Every job in FinalReport.ranked_matches has a source_url that HEAD-checks to 2xx/3xx. Run log shows validate_url_active was called and any dead links were dropped with warnings.
expectations: job_scout's run log shows at least one call to validate_url_active
Every ranked_match.job.source_url passes a HEAD check at grading time (HTTP 2xx/3xx)
For each job dropped due to a dead link, the run log contains an entry beginning 'dead-link dropped:' with the job id and observed status
The count of jobs handed to technical_analyst equals (scout_initial_results - duplicates_dropped - dead_links_dropped)
blockers: Every ranked_match.job.source_url passes a HEAD check at grading time (HTTP 2xx/3xx)
